articles.title: Dangerous and potentially record-setting heat wave to scorch millions this July Fourth - CNN
articles.description: Millions of Americans across the eastern half of the US are facing a prolonged stretch of dangerous and potentially record-breaking heat as Americans get set to head outdoors to celebrate the country’s 250th Independence Day.
